claimBoundary: Persistent PostgreSQL/PostGIS geometry baseline using an on-disk Docker volume, GiST indexes, and ST_Covers for the five experiment-defined Polygon zones. Event and duration labels are derived from returned sampled memberships. This is not a concurrent service benchmark, continuous-trajectory evaluation, or comparison with an RDF triplestore.

dataset.name: NOAA IBTrACS v04r01 since1980 list CSV
